g.text: READ-THROUGH (cache pulls from DB on miss)
WRITE-THROUGH (cache writes to DB before ack)

text.tspan: WRITE-BEHIND RISK: if cache crashes between step 2 and step 3,
the write is LOST. The app thinks it succeeded; the DB doesn't have it.
Use only when you can either: (a) tolerate loss (metrics, counters), or
(b) the cache has its own durable WAL (Redis AOF, etc.)

g.text: 2. on MISS: SELECT (cache calls DB transparently)
